summary: Implemented GNOME Shell extension-based workaround for WezTerm cross-window tab navigation on Wayland. Added activate-window-by-title extension to home.nix and modified wezterm.lua with compositor detection and D-Bus focus fallback for GNOME sessions.

artifacts.summary: Added GNOME extension package and dconf enabled-extensions setting
Added compositor detection and GNOME D-Bus focus fallback functions
Implementation summary with verification results and post-rebuild testing instructions

completion_data.completion_summary: Fixed WezTerm cross-window tab navigation on GNOME/Wayland by adding activate-window-by-title GNOME Shell extension and D-Bus fallback in wezterm.lua. Requires nixos-rebuild switch and re-login to activate.

next_steps: Run nixos-rebuild switch and re-login to activate GNOME extension, then test cross-window tab navigation
